description: PHASE C — RESTORE: After Phase B cash withdrawal, operator intervenes with two TradFi mechanisms: (1) early T-bill liquidation at 3% penalty — sells the 26-week T-bill on secondary market before maturity, paying $780 penalty but freeing $25,220 as immediate cash; (2) $15,000 capital injection from treasury fund. Combined effect restores all three health metrics above thresholds.

portfolioAdjustments.reason: Cash still withdrawn from Phase B — regulatory payment already made

contracts.description: Emergency capital injection from treasury fund — $15,000

earlyLiquidations.reason: Sell 26-week T-bill on secondary market before maturity to restore liquidity
